raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red drum with a white drumhead sits on a wooden table. A red drumstick is positioned to the right of the drum. The drum has a cylindrical body and a circular drumhead; the drumstick is a slender, elongated object. STRATEGY - To play the drum, the drumstick must be grasped and used to strike the drumhead. The task requires reaching for the drumstick, grasping it, transporting it to the drumhead, and then striking. Failure modes include dropping the drumstick or missing the drumhead. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drumstick body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the drumstick for secure hold; Step 3 transport the drumstick to the drumhead; Step 4 strike the drumhead with the drumstick.
Goal: struck(red_drum)
Scene: red_drum, red_drumstick, table
Step 1: reach(red_drumstick)
  affordance_region: the body of the red drumstick
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_drumstick, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_drumstick) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_drumstick)
  affordance_region: the body of the red drumstick
  contact: holding(red_drumstick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_drumstick)
Step 3: transport(red_drumstick -> red_drum)
  affordance_region: the drumhead of the red drum
  spatial: above(red_drumstick, red_drum, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_drumstick)
  done_when: above(red_drumstick, red_drum, 0.05)
Step 4: strike(red_drumstick, red_drum)
  affordance_region: the drumhead of the red drum
  contact: surface_contact(red_drumstick, red_drum) [completion]
  pose: struck(red_drum) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_drumstick, red_drum)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red drumstick
the body of the red drumstick
the drumhead of the red drum
the drumhead of the red drum
